run_metadata.coverage_summary: Daily incremental discovery run. Tier 1 federal + all state/territory portals surveyed via web search (AusTender, buy.nsw, Buying for Victoria, QTenders, Tenders WA, Tenders SA, Tenders Tasmania, QTOL NT, Tenders ACT); Tier 2 sampled (local government via VendorPanel + Hawkesbury City Council; GBE water corporations Sydney Water / Melbourne Water / SA Water; universities ANU and UWA); Tier 3 sampled (SAP Ariba / SAP Business Network Discovery, EstimateOne construction subcontractor packages). IMPORTANT COVERAGE LIMITATION (unchanged from the 2026-07-06 run): this run executed under a restrictive network egress policy that blocked direct HTTPS access to every tender portal. All portal hosts (www.tenders.gov.au, tenders.vic.gov.au, vendorpanel.com.au, tenders.tas.gov.au, etc.) returned proxy '403 to CONNECT' policy denials, confirmed against the agent-proxy status endpoint (kind=connect_rejected). Only WebSearch (a separate backend) was usable; no primary tender detail page or tender document could be opened directly. Every opportunity below was surfaced from indexed web-search snippets with real detail-page URLs and consistent titles; headline identity fields are corroborated but closing dates/times, values, deliverables, eligibility and contacts were NOT verifiable against the primary notice and must be confirmed on the buyer portal. Every captured tender is consequently flagged as pending a detail pass.
gaps: Network egress policy blocked ALL direct portal fetches this run. Both WebFetch and curl returned 'CONNECT tunnel failed, response 403' for www.tenders.gov.au, tenders.vic.gov.au, www.vendorpanel.com.au and www.tenders.tas.gov.au; the agent-proxy status endpoint recorded these as kind=connect_rejected 'gateway answered 403 to CONNECT (policy denial)'. This is an organisation egress-policy denial, not portal bot-protection, and was not routed around. Only WebSearch was available; no primary detail page or tender document was read.

Because detail pages were unreachable, closing dates/times, values, contract terms, deliverables, eligibility, evaluation criteria and contacts for every captured tender are UNVERIFIED against the primary notice. Dates shown are taken from search-result snippets and need confirmation on the buyer portal before downstream reliance.

AusTender: current ATM list and all /Atm/Show detail pages unreachable for direct extraction. ATO 'SES Band 1 / EL2 Talent Development Programs' (PROC-15553) appeared in search with a 6-Jul-2026 close date and was excluded as already closed relative to the 7-Jul run date.

SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network Discovery: no Australian open RFx was publicly visible in search without a supplier login this run, and the posting board itself was unreachable. No corporate opportunity captured as a tender (recorded as portals/registration-gated only). Invitation-only consultancy RFPs remain out of scope by design.

Tier 3 corporate buyer portals (BHP, Rio Tinto, Fortescue, Sydney Water SAP Ariba supplier registration, Melbourne Water Zycus) are registration-gated; individual opportunities not captured. Recorded at portal level only.

Tenders WA, Tenders SA, Tenders Tasmania, QTOL NT and Tenders ACT returned only navigational/landing results in search this run (no specific current opportunities surfaced); the 'Tenders SA' query was polluted by South-Africa results. These jurisdictions are under-covered this run and deferred to a future run when portal access is available.

QLD long day care set: search surfaced sibling VendorPanel references (Yarrabilba VP513152, Yorkeys Knob VP513154) alongside the two captured entries; the full set was not enumerable without portal access.
Tenders Tasmania EDSS support/hosting RFT (captured on 2026-07-06) was not re-verifiable this run; not re-included today. It may still be open until ~31-Jul-2026 on tenders.tas.gov.au.
recommended_seed_additions: AusTender Supplier Portal (new public, searchable supplier-capability database rolling out from mid-2026 via tenders.gov.au) - track once live
Bradfield Development Authority industry/procurement opportunities (Western Parkland City, NSW) - wpca.sydney / bradfield
Buying for Victoria companion domain buyingfor.vic.gov.au/browse-tenders (front-of-house to tenders.vic.gov.au)
Hawkesbury City Council current tenders (NSW local government not previously catalogued)

tenders.title: AIMS NT Small Research Vessel Replacement
tenders.category: Marine vessels / Naval architecture and construction
tenders.description: Request for tender for the design, construction, supply and delivery of a new fit-for-purpose small research vessel to AIMS Darwin, Northern Territory, to sustain AIMS marine operations across NT marine, estuarine and river systems.
tenders.deliverables_summary: The supplier (a vessel constructor) must design, build, supply and deliver a new small research vessel to AIMS in Darwin, NT. The vessel is to support AIMS' small-vessel fleet operations - launch and retrieval of scientific equipment, scientific surveys, towing, and transfers to larger research and charter vessels - across NT marine, estuarine and river systems.
key_deliverables: Supply and delivery of the vessel to AIMS Darwin, NT
Capability for launch/retrieval of scientific equipment, surveys, towing and vessel transfers
tenders.scope_of_work: AIMS requires the design, construction, supply and delivery of a new small research vessel for its Northern Territory operations. Per the notice, AIMS conducts procurement under the Commonwealth Procurement Rules, with open approaches advertised on AusTender for goods/services above ~A$400,000 (or above $7.5m for construction services).
tenders.eligibility: Open to vessel constructors (open approach to market); specific mandatory requirements not verified against the primary notice this run.
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via targeted web search of AusTender; buyer-originated Commonwealth ATM (AIMS). Scope paragraph quoted from the search index of the notice; detail page could not be opened due to the egress block.
tenders.notes: Scope text is from the search index of the AusTender notice, not the opened page. Closing date/time UNVERIFIED. Confirm on tenders.gov.au before relying; closes very soon (10-Jul-2026).

tenders.title: Gallipoli & Kokoda Barracks Infrastructure Upgrades
tenders.description: Approach to market for infrastructure upgrades at Gallipoli and Kokoda Barracks (Defence estate).
tenders.deliverables_summary: Infrastructure upgrade works at Gallipoli and Kokoda Barracks. Detailed scope, works packages and conditions not verified against the primary notice due to the egress block this run.
tenders.delivery_location: Gallipoli & Kokoda Barracks (Enoggera, QLD - to confirm)
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search of the AusTender current ATM list; the 'S-EST' reference prefix and barracks subject indicate a Defence estate works ATM. Buyer inferred (Department of Defence) and NOT confirmed.
tenders.notes: Headline captured from search index. Buyer, tender_url deep link and closing time UNVERIFIED due to egress block. Closes very soon (8-Jul-2026). Confirm on tenders.gov.au.

tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search of the AusTender current ATM list; buyer-originated Commonwealth ATM (Department of Defence), reference JSD/RFT/75462/1.
tenders.notes: Headline captured from search index. Deep-link tender_url, scope and closing time UNVERIFIED due to egress block. Closes very soon (10-Jul-2026). Confirm on tenders.gov.au.

tenders.title: Sydney Park Junction - Stage 2 Construction
tenders.description: Request for tender inviting construction companies to undertake Stage 2 of the Sydney Park Junction project - upgrades to the Princes Highway around King Street and Sydney Park - improving connectivity in the precinct.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Construction of Stage 2 of the Sydney Park Junction project, comprising upgrades to the Princes Highway (with work on the Princes Highway starting in 2026) and improved connectivity around Princes Highway, King Street and Sydney Park. Full works scope not verified against the primary notice due to the egress block this run.
key_deliverables: Stage 2 civil construction works on the Princes Highway
Precinct connectivity upgrades around King Street and Sydney Park
tenders.eligibility: Open to appropriately qualified and experienced construction companies (to confirm against the notice).
tenders.submission_method: Lodge online via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering
tenders.delivery_location: Princes Highway / King Street / Sydney Park, NSW
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search of buy.nsw open opportunities plus the Transport for NSW project page; buyer-originated RFT from Transport for NSW / Transport Infrastructure Projects.
tenders.notes: Headline captured from search index; deep-link tender_url, tender reference, closing time and detail fields UNVERIFIED due to egress block. Confirm on buy.nsw.

tenders.title: Drinking Water Program EPCM - Request for Expression of Interest
tenders.description: Request for expression of interest for Engineering, Procurement and Construction Management (EPCM) services for Sydney Water's Drinking Water Program, with an indicative delivery timeframe of 2026-2032.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Provision of Engineering, Procurement and Construction Management (EPCM) services to deliver Sydney Water's multi-year Drinking Water Program (indicatively 2026-2032). This EOI seeks capable EPCM providers ahead of a fuller procurement. Detailed scope, packages and conditions not verified against the primary notice due to the egress block this run.
key_deliverables: EPCM services across the Drinking Water Program
Engineering, procurement and construction management support over the 2026-2032 program
tenders.eligibility: Open EOI; specific prequalification/capability requirements not verified this run.
tenders.submission_method: Lodge online via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering (Sydney Water also uses SAP Ariba for prequalification/tender)
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search; buyer-originated EOI from Sydney Water Corporation (a NSW GBE) published on buy.nsw with a deep-link prcOpportunity URL (reference SWC-WS5192918179).
tenders.notes: Contact email/phone are Sydney Water's general Business Connect line from their suppliers page, not opportunity-specific. Closing date not surfaced in search; deep-link tender_url captured but not opened. Scope UNVERIFIED due to egress block. Confirm on buy.nsw / Sydney Water.

tenders.title: Lease and operate a new long day care service - Rosewood
tenders.category: Community services / Childcare (early childhood education and care)
tenders.description: Request for tender to lease and operate a new long day care (childcare) service at Rosewood, Queensland, on behalf of the Department of Education.
tenders.deliverables_summary: The successful respondent will lease and operate a new long day care (early childhood education and care) service at Rosewood, QLD - i.e. establish and run childcare operations at a state-provided facility. Detailed lease terms, facility specifications and operating requirements not verified against the primary notice due to the egress block this run.
key_deliverables: Lease of the new long day care facility at Rosewood
Operation/delivery of long day care (childcare) services
tenders.eligibility: Long day care / childcare operators (to confirm against the notice).
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via web search of QTenders/Queensland Government; buyer-originated RFT from the QLD Department of Education, VendorPanel reference VP513149. Part of a set of new long day care tenders closing 24-Jul-2026.
tenders.notes: Headline captured from search index. Sibling tenders in the same set: Yarrabilba (VP513152), Yorkeys Knob (VP513154), Chinchilla (VP512938). Deep-link tender_url and closing time UNVERIFIED due to egress block. Confirm on QTenders/VendorPanel.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Source-discovery search on new Australian government supplier portals surfaced reporting that the Commonwealth is rolling out a new AusTender Supplier Portal from mid-2026 - a publicly searchable database where suppliers self-register capabilities and credentials at no cost, which agencies browse when planning procurements (complements published ATMs).
discovered_sources.notes: New procurement-modernisation channel distinct from the existing GovPanels supplier portal. Registration opens from July 2026 per secondary reporting; not yet directly verifiable this run due to the egress block. Track for go-live and confirm the live URL/registration path on tenders.gov.au.

discovered_sources.source_name: Bradfield Development Authority - Industry & procurement opportunities
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Found while confirming the Sydney Park Junction RFT; the Bradfield Development Authority (Western Parkland City / former WPCA) publishes an industry-opportunities and 'guide to NSW and Australian Government tenders' page pointing to its own procurement pipeline for the new city around Western Sydney International Airport.
discovered_sources.notes: State development authority delivering Bradfield City Centre; a buyer-originated procurement channel. Major opportunities may also mirror onto buy.nsw. Not directly fetchable this run (egress 403); confidence medium pending confirmation of its own live opportunities listing.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Victorian Tier 1 sweep surfaced buyingfor.vic.gov.au/browse-tenders as the front-of-house 'Buying for Victoria' site complementing the existing tenders.vic.gov.au supplier portal - a companion domain not previously catalogued.
discovered_sources.notes: Same Victorian Government procurement system as tenders.vic.gov.au (already known), but this browse-tenders domain is a distinct entry point worth recording. Not directly fetchable this run (egress 403).

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Surfaced via the buy.nsw open-opportunities sweep, which listed a Hawkesbury City Council construction-services RFT; Hawkesbury is a NSW council not previously catalogued in the known-source list (it publishes on buy.nsw and its own council site).
discovered_sources.notes: NSW local government buyer-originated source; opportunities appear on buy.nsw and the council's own tenders page. Council tenders URL to confirm; not directly fetchable this run (egress 403).
